summary: -Quick Actions Menu | Hearing Options When in Rewinded State
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Quick Actions Menu
AND TTS is enabled
AND the user is in the rewinded state

steps.action: WHEN the user focuses on the Quick Actions Menu while in a rewinded state
steps.result:
THEN the order of options should be:
"Gameday option (1/4), <Last Channel Game> option (2/4), Jump to Live option (3/4), Captions option (4/4)"
